overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a large industrial cargo ship at dawn. The camera slowly pans from inside the ship's bridge to the exterior deck, revealing the vessel's superstructure silhouetted against a golden sky with distant lightning.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge interior with navigation controls

agents.ego_description: slowly panning view from inside the ship bridge looking out at the ocean and distant superstructure

entered.detail: large rectangular window frame surrounding the viewport
single wiper arm mounted on the exterior of the bridge window
control panels and equipment inside the bridge interior
tall industrial tower structure visible through the window
metal crane arm extending above the deck
calm sea surface reflecting the dawn light

segments.scene_description: Inside the ship's bridge, the camera slowly pans left across the navigation console. Through the large window, the industrial superstructure and cargo crane are visible silhouetted against the golden dawn sky, with calm ocean waters stretching to the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship deck with industrial superstructure and cargo crane

events.description: camera transitions from interior bridge to exterior ship deck view
lightning flash illuminates the clouds on the horizon

agents.ego_description: viewing the ship's exterior industrial structures and ocean from the deck level

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figures standing on the upper deck near the communication mast

entered.detail: metal side of the ship with railings and deck details
three large curved exhaust pipes on the superstructure
tall antenna tower with multiple crossbars and equipment
flag waving on a pole attached to the superstructure

segments.scene_description: Now on the exterior deck, the camera reveals the ship's industrial superstructure silhouetted against the brightening dawn sky. The cargo crane extends over the calm water while exhaust stacks and a communication mast dominate the skyline. Distant lightning briefly flashes as the flag waves in the gentle breeze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered interior of a ship's bridge to the expansive industrial deck under a brightening dawn sky. It begins with a slow pan across a navigation console, looking through a large window at the silhouetted superstructure and cargo crane against a golden horizon. As the perspective shifts to the exterior deck, the view opens up to reveal the towering exhaust stacks and a communication mast dominating the skyline. The scene then expands to show the cargo crane extending over calm ocean waters while a flag waves in the gentle breeze. Finally, the golden light intensifies as distant lightning briefly flashes across the waking sky.
